name: Orion
visual_description: a 30 year old man with a long beard. He is contemplative and a professional

name: The protagonist
visual_description: a clean-cut 40 year old nerdy man with glasses

name: Compaq portable
visual_description: 1980s beige portable computer, 30 pounds with handle

name: The office
visual_description: an indoor workspace where the team typically conducts initial testing with a limited group of users.

name: The Sunnyvale Town Center Mall
visual_description: a bustling indoor shopping center during the day, filled with diverse crowds of varying ages and backgrounds, including people with canes, children, and shoppers.

name: The RadioShack
visual_description: a retail store within the mall, featuring tables with demo computers, shelves of personal electronics like the Tandy CoCo 2, and a view of the tiled mall concourse where children run.

name: The back of the AMC Eagle
visual_description: a cargo space where the 30-pound Compaq portable computer is tossed and dragged during loading and unloading.
